Table.name: Instrument_Entity_role_assignment
Table.commentInRDBMS: An Instrument Entity role assignment is the combination of an Instrument and an Entity role that indicates which Instrument is assigned to which Entity role.

Column.name: Instrument_Entity_role_assignment_type
Column.comment: A discriminator to distinguish between different assignments between instruments and party roles, for example deposit taking corporation deposit assignment.

Column.name: Instrument_reference_date
Column.comment: The date the data refers to.

Column.name: Instrument_reporting_agent_identifier
Column.comment: Identifier of the reporting agent.

Column.name: Instrument_accounting_consolidation_level
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Instrument_identifier
Column.comment: An identifier applied by the reporting agent to uniquely identify each instrument under a single contract. Each instrument must have one instrument identifier. This value will not change over time and cannot be used as the instrument identifier for any other instrument under the same contract.

Column.name: Servicer_accounting_consolidation_level
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Servicer_role_type
Column.comment: The servicer role.

Column.name: Servicer_Party_identifier
Column.comment: The party identifier of the involved servicer.

Column.name: Equity_instrument_that_is_not_a_security_reference_date2
Column.comment: The date the data refers to.

Column.name: Equity_instrument_that_is_not_a_security_reporting_agent_identifier2
Column.comment: Identifier of the reporting agent.

Column.name: Equity_instrument_that_is_not_a_security_accounting_consolidation_level2
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Equity_instrument_that_is_not_a_security_identifier2
Column.comment: An identifier applied by the reporting agent to uniquely identify each instrument under a single contract. Each instrument must have one instrument identifier. This value will not change over time and cannot be used as the instrument identifier for any other instrument under the same contract.

Column.name: Investor_accounting_consolidation_level
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Investor_role_type
Column.comment: The investor role.

Column.name: Investor_identifier
Column.comment: The party identifier of the involved investor.

Column.name: Financial_lease_reference_date2
Column.comment: The date the data refers to.

Column.name: Financial_lease_reporting_agent_identifier2
Column.comment: Identifier of the reporting agent.

Column.name: Financial_lease_accounting_consolidation_level2
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Financial_lease_identifier2
Column.comment: The instrument identifier of the involved financial lease.

Column.name: Lessor_accounting_consolidation_level
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Lessor_Party_role_type
Column.comment: The lessor role.

Column.name: Lessor_Party_identifier
Column.comment: The party identifier of the involved lessor.

Column.name: Equity_instrument_that_is_not_a_security_reference_date
Column.comment: The date the data refers to.

Column.name: Equity_instrument_that_is_not_a_security_reporting_agent_identifier
Column.comment: Identifier of the reporting agent.

Column.name: Equity_instrument_that_is_not_a_security_accounting_consolidation_level
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Equity_instrument_that_is_not_a_security_identifier
Column.comment: An identifier applied by the reporting agent to uniquely identify each instrument under a single contract. Each instrument must have one instrument identifier. This value will not change over time and cannot be used as the instrument identifier for any other instrument under the same contract.

Column.name: Issuer_accounting_consolidation_level
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Issuer_role_type
Column.comment: A discriminator to distinguish between different roles a party may act in. Examples are debtor, creditor, servicer.

Column.name: Issuer_identifier
Column.comment: An identifier that uniquely identifies a party.

Column.name: Advance_reference_date2
Column.comment: The date the data refers to.

Column.name: Advance_reporting_agent_identifier2
Column.comment: Identifier of the reporting agent.

Column.name: Advance_accounting_consolidation_level2
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Advance_identifier2
Column.comment: The instrument identifier of the involved Advance.

Column.name: Loan_debtor_accounting_consolidation_level5
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Loan_debtor_role_type3
Column.comment: The loan debtor role.

Column.name: Loan_debtor_identifier3
Column.comment: The party identifier of the involved debtor.

Column.name: Litigation_status
Column.comment: Finrep Annex V, Part 2.321, 322: An exposure shall be ‘in pre-litigation status’ where the debtor has been formally notified that the institution will take legal action against the debtor within a defined time period, unless certain contractual or other payment obligations are met. That shall also include cases where the contract has been terminated by the reporting institution because the debtor is in formal breach of the terms and conditions of the contract and the debtor has been notified accordingly, but no legal action against the debtor has formally been taken by the institution yet. Exposures classified as ‘in pre-litigation status’ can exit this classification if the outstanding amounts are paid or if they enter into litigation status as defined in the following paragraph. An exposure shall be ‘in litigation status’ where legal action against the debtor has formally been taken. This comprises cases where a court of law confirmed that formal judiciary proceedings have occurred or the judiciary system has been notified of the intention to commence legal proceedings.

Column.name: Credit_card_debt_reference_date2
Column.comment: The date the data refers to.

Column.name: Credit_card_debt_reporting_agent_identifier2
Column.comment: Identifier of the reporting agent.

Column.name: Credit_card_debt_accounting_consolidation_level2
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Credit_card_debt_identifier2
Column.comment: The instrument identifier of the involved credit card debt.

Column.name: Creditor_accounting_consolidation_level2
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Creditor_role_type1
Column.comment: The creditor party role.

Column.name: Creditor_identifier1
Column.comment: The party identifier of the involved creditor.

Column.name: Other_loan_accounting_consolidation_level2
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Other_loan_Instrument_identifier
Column.comment: The instrument identifier of the involved other loan.

Column.name: Loan_debtor_reference_date1
Column.comment: The date the data refers to.

Column.name: Loan_debtor_reporting_agent_identifier1
Column.comment: Identifier of the reporting agent.

Column.name: Loan_debtor_accounting_consolidation_level1
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Loan_debtor_Party_role_type2
Column.comment: The loan debtor role.

Column.name: Loan_debtor_Party_identifier2
Column.comment: The party identifier of the involved debtor.

Column.name: Main_debtor_indicator
Column.comment: An indicator specifying if a debtor is the main debtor.

Column.name: Joint_liability_amount
Column.comment: Outstanding nominal amount for which each debtor is liable in relation to a single instrument where there are two or more debtors.

Column.name: Credit_card_debt_reference_date
Column.comment: The date the data refers to.

Column.name: Credit_card_debt_reporting_agent_identifier
Column.comment: Identifier of the reporting agent.

Column.name: Credit_card_debt_accounting_consolidation_level
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Credit_card_debt_identifier
Column.comment: The instrument identifier of the involved credit card debt.

Column.name: Loan_debtor_accounting_consolidation_level4
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Loan_debtor_Party_role_type
Column.comment: The loan debtor role.

Column.name: Loan_debtor_Party_identifier
Column.comment: The party identifier of the involved debtor.

Column.name: Repurchase_agreement_Instrument_identifier2
Column.comment: The instrument identifier of the involved repurchase agreement.

Column.name: Seller_role_type2

Column.name: Seller_identifier2

Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Other_loan_identifier
Column.comment: The instrument identifier of the involved other loan.

Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Syndication_or_sub-participation_member_instrument_identifier
Column.comment: An identifier applied by the reporting agent to uniquely identify each instrument under a single contract. Each instrument must have one instrument identifier. This value will not change over time and cannot be used as the instrument identifier for any other instrument under the same contract.

Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.comment: An identifier applied by the reporting agent to uniquely identify each instrument under a single contract. Each instrument must have one instrument identifier.
